aboutIntro: I am a student of Internet Systems Technology at IFSul - Campus Charqueadas, focusing on web development and creating modern and efficient digital solutions. Throughout my journey, I have been working with various technologies and accumulating valuable experiences in real projects.

additionalSkills: I also have knowledge in languages and tools such as Java, C, Python and PHP, which provides me with a solid foundation to work in different contexts and technical challenges.
professionalProfile: As a professional, I am organized, communicative, and collaborative. I have intermediate English skills and am familiar with agile methodologies, information security, artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and Open Finance. Committed to delivering quality results, I am always seeking continuous improvement and constant learning.
experienceSectionDescription: My journey in the job market
exp_depsResponsibilities: Development of complete web applications using Node.js and TypeScript, ensuring performance and code quality with good software engineering practices.
Implementation of back-end logic and management of communication with the database (PostgreSQL), using Prisma ORM, ensuring data manipulation and flow for the APIs.
Conducting negotiations with clients, achieving alignment of expectations and ensuring solutions adhere to business needs.
Optimization of workflows through the application of agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban).
Code development focusing on the user interface and experience (UI/UX).
Implementation of the application's graphical interface using HTML5, CSS, Tailwind, React, and Next.js, ensuring responsive design and performance.
Application of agile methodologies (Scrum and Kanban) to optimize workflow and delivery schedules.
exp_compassResponsibilities: Immersion and deepening in Open Finance, financial innovation, and information security.
Study and application of emerging technologies, including cloud computing (AWS), artificial intelligence, and blockchain.
Development of a team application focused on Open Finance, using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, and MVC architecture.
Project management with agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban) and version control via Git/GitHub, with containerization using Docker.
Achievement of the AWS Cloud Practitioner certification.
exp_domvsResponsibilities: Acting in the development of internal applications and systems using the .NET and React stack.
Implementation of scalable interfaces following the Atomic Design methodology to create modular and reusable components.
Construction and maintenance of .NET APIs based on Clean Architecture and SOLID principles, ensuring low coupling and ease of maintenance.
Active participation in all stages of the software development lifecycle (SDLC), including requirements analysis and system modeling with UML.
Collaboration in an agile team with Scrum methodology, participating in daily meetings, sprint reviews, and Pair Programming sessions to optimize code quality.
Use of Azure DevOps for demand management (Boards) and source code version control (Repos).
